strategy: Trap Poseidon with multi-target spells only. Any single-target charm, prism, or trap makes him natural-attack and wipe all traps off himself; Windstorm and other AoE traps are safe.
He recasts Infallible whenever he has no aura, so he will not fizzle; do not rely on accuracy debuffs.
He is stunable, so a stun buys the team a safe setup round.
Hit with Myth or Life (+35%, resists Storm 80%); funnel blades to the hitter and use AoE traps.
Burst him down and clear the Atlantean Trierarch with the same AoE.
cheatNotes: He recasts Infallible whenever he lacks an aura, so he will not fizzle; accuracy debuffs are wasted on him.
Any single-target charm, prism, or trap makes him natural-attack and strip all traps off himself, so trap him only with multi-target spells like Windstorm.
Spells with single-target secondary effects also trigger the trap-wipe, so watch enchanted hits.
